title: Client Side Heaven
description: A collection of my favourite client-side mods to play minecraft while still keeping it vanilla!
body:
# **This is a simple collection of mods aimed at improving the vanilla minecraft experience.**

This pack includes a number of QOL improvement mods, client rewrite mods, optimizations and more.

(For those who aren't a fan of the Distant Horizons mod, you can turn off the extra world generation in the config menu)

**This modpack includes:**
- [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin)
- [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api)
- [BetterF3](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3)
- [Borderless Mining](https://modrinth.com/mod/borderless-mining)
- [Capes](https://modrinth.com/mod/capes)
- [Concurrent Chunk Management](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric)
- [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)
- [Craftify](https://modrinth.com/mod/craftify)
- [Distant Horizions](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons)
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin)
- [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)
- [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium)
- [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)
- [LazyDFU](https://modrinth.com/mod/lazydfu)
- [Let me play Iris!](https://modrinth.com/mod/let-me-play-iris)
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)
- [Memory Leak Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/memoryleakfix)
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
- [More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling)
- [Not Enough Crashes](https://modrinth.com/mod/notenoughcrashes)
- [Phosphor](https://modrinth.com/mod/phosphor)
- [Roughly Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei)
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)
- [Very Many Players](https://modrinth.com/mod/vmp-fabric)
- [YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)
- [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify)
